OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The MIME types of files the connector can process.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable or disable auto-import of files.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: The confidence level of the connector, from 0 (Unknown) to 100 (Fully trusted).

YARA_IMPORT_FILE_SPLIT_RULES.description: If true, creates individual STIX Indicators for each YARA rule in the file. If false, combines all rules into one Indicator.
